blended.narrative: Boreal Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 7" over the past week. Current depth: 38".
